title: Download Response
description: Represents the payload emitted during a download operation, including progress state, byte counts, status, and the Blob data on completion.

props.name: bytesReceived
props.description: Number of bytes received so far.

props.name: totalBytes
props.description: Total number of bytes expected to be downloaded.

props.name: data
props.description: The downloaded Blob data when the download completes.
